name: Terminal AI
description: AI-driven terminal automation - analyzes screen and types commands

inputs.name: Session
inputs.description: Optional: Use existing session. If not connected, creates new terminal.

inputs.name: Task
inputs.description: Dynamic task description (overrides property if connected)

inputs.name: Context Image
inputs.description: Optional image for additional context (e.g., reference screenshot)

outputs.name: Session
outputs.description: Pass-through session for chaining multiple AI controls

outputs.name: Screenshot
outputs.description: Final screenshot (can be fed to next AI control)

properties.name: Task Description
properties.description: Describe what the AI should accomplish in the terminal

properties.name: Shell
properties.description: Shell to use (when no session connected)

properties.name: Model
properties.description: Vision-capable model (leave empty for provider default)

properties.name: API Key Constant
properties.description: Name of the constant containing the API key

properties.name: System Prompt
properties.default: You are an AI assistant controlling a terminal. Analyze the screenshot and determine what to type or what keys to press to accomplish the task. Respond with JSON containing your observation, reasoning, and action.
properties.description: Custom system prompt for the AI

properties.name: Screenshot Delay (ms)
properties.description: Delay after actions before taking a screenshot

properties.name: Max Iterations
properties.description: Maximum number of AI iterations before stopping

compiler.template: {{outputVar}} = await Terminal.aiControl({{session}}, {{#if task}}{{task}}{{else}}{{json taskDescription}}{{/if}}, { shell: {{json shell}}, workingDir: {{json workingDir}}, showWindow: {{showWindow}}, systemPrompt: {{json systemPrompt}}, screenshotDelayMs: {{screenshotDelayMs}}, maxIterations: {{maxIterations}}, provider: {{json provider}}, model: {{json model}}, apiKey: {{json apiKey}}, apiKeyConstant: {{json apiKeyConstant}}, endpoint: {{json endpoint}}, format: {{json format}}, maxTokens: {{maxTokens}}, contextImage: {{contextImage}} }, '{{nodeId}}'); let {{outputVar}}_session = {{outputVar}}.session; let {{outputVar}}_result = {{outputVar}}.result; let {{outputVar}}_screenshot = {{outputVar}}.screenshot

doc:
# Terminal AI

AI-driven terminal automation. Just describe a task and the AI will:
1. Take screenshots of the terminal
2. Analyze what it sees
3. Type commands and press keys
4. Repeat until the task is done

**Self-contained**: Creates its own terminal, or use an existing session.

**Chainable**: Connect the session output to another Terminal AI to run multiple tasks.

**Requires vision model** (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, etc.)
